documents.label: 278 Transaction
documents.agency: Federal Reserve System Board of Governors
documents.title: Member, Board of Governors
documents.summary: 278-T signed 04/03/2026 and OGE-certified 04/21/2026. Discloses seven transactions between 01/20/2026 and 03/02/2026 within BBH Wealth Strategies LLC, including a Silver Point Distressed Opportunity II Series capital call purchase and multiple Clarkston Capital Partners Small/Mid Cap Series sales plus a BBH Limited Duration Fund Cl I sale. Endnotes mark sales 2-5 as manager-initiated redemptions because the strategy is being wound down, not transactions initiated by Miran. All marked No on the 30-day notification flag.

documents.label: Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance
documents.agency: Federal Reserve System Board of Governors
documents.title: Governor
documents.summary: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification digitally signed 09/27/2025 (note: signed before due date 12/23/2025; OGE intake date is 04/18/2026). Lists ethics agreement signed 09/02/2025, confirmed 09/15/2025. Marks N/A on resignations, divestitures, and 278-T filing rows. Marks Yes on managed accounts notification, both recusal categories, initial ethics briefing, and additional ethics requirements. Section 10 cites 12 U.S.C. Sections 244 and 620 banking-stock prohibition and notes SM Consulting 1 LLC will remain dormant during appointment.

documents.label: 278 Transaction
documents.agency: Federal Reserve System Board of Governors
documents.title: Member, Board of Governors
documents.summary: 278-T signed 12/03/2025 and OGE-certified 12/30/2025. Discloses one transaction: a purchase of iShares S&P 500 Index Fund (IVV) on 11/14/2025 in the $500,001-$1,000,000 range, marked No on the 30-day notification flag.

documents.label: 278 Transaction
documents.title: Chairman, Council of Economic Advisers
documents.summary: Large 278-T signed 07/21/2025 and OGE-certified 09/02/2025 covering Miran's CEA-era divestitures. Discloses 69 transactions: 57 individual-stock sales executed 06/09/2025 (Abbott, Adobe, Alphabet, Amazon, Berkshire Hathaway, Eli Lilly, Microsoft, Mastercard, Oracle, S&P Global, Costco, etc.), plus ETF sales/purchases (XLF, IYT, SHYD, TLT) and S&P 500 futures and options opened in March and closed in May. All rows marked No on the 30-day notification flag, with totals reaching the $100,001-$250,000 and $250,001-$500,000 ranges for several positions.

documents.label: Ethics Agreement
documents.agency: Federal Reserve System Board of Governors
documents.title: Governor (nominee)
documents.summary: Ethics agreement letter to Federal Reserve DAEO Sean D. Croston dated 09/02/2025. Records that Miran resigned from Hudson Bay Capital Management LP effective 02/21/2025 (received 2024 bonus same date); resigned from Manhattan Institute for Policy Research effective 02/21/2025; and that SM Consulting 1 LLC ceased business in February 2025 and will remain dormant. Section 5 cites the 12 U.S.C. banking-stock prohibition applicable to Federal Reserve governors.

documents.label: Nominee 278
documents.agency: Federal Reserve System Board of Governors
documents.title: Governor (nominee)
documents.summary: Nominee 278e signed 08/20/2025 and OGE-certified 09/03/2025. Lists Miran's prior positions including Hudson Bay Capital Management LP (Senior strategist 2/2024-2/2025, $1,609,182 salary/bonus), Manhattan Institute (Fellow), Amberwave Partners (Co-founder, 8/2021-12/2023), and Balyasny Asset Management (consultant). Discloses brokerage holdings (TLT ETF, PIMCO PFIAX in HBC 401(k)), Roth IRA, spouse's employment with ECPI University ($457,954 ordinary income) and Advanced Tech Institute LLC, plus other assets including Fidelity SPAXX, Fannie Mae, XLF, Cytokinetics, and Enovix.

documents.label: Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance
documents.title: Chairman, Council of Economic Advisers
documents.summary: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification signed 06/10/2025 for Miran's earlier role as CEA Chairman. Lists ethics agreement signed 02/26/2025, confirmed 03/12/2025, certification due 06/17/2025. Marks Yes on resignations and divestitures and No on the 278-T row, with the comments box stating the 278-T to reflect divestitures will be filed within the required timeframe. Section 8 box marks that an annual bonus from previous employer Hudson Bay Capital Management was received prior to assumption of duties.

propublicaCheck.filingsListedThere: Stephen Miran did not appear in the ProPublica Trump Team Financial Disclosures landing page check or its top-20 wealthiest section. ProPublica's full database (search-driven) may still include him; not verified at this time.
propublicaCheck.discrepancies: None identified between OGE filings collected here and any ProPublica record; ProPublica visibility cannot be confirmed from the landing page alone.
